pr.title: Record: Train Larger, Quantize Harder - 33.6M params / int5 GPTQ / (val_bpb: 1.1164)

output.summary: Deploys a 33.6M-parameter 11-layer Transformer quantized via GPTQ+QAT and counters score-first TTT overconfidence with a T=0.98 re-score.
techniques: Full-Hessian int5 GPTQ with early QAT and 2% pruning
Post-TTT T=0.98 calibration to correct score-first TTT overconfidence
11-layer/512d model with XSA-all, BigramHash, and LeakyReLU²
